name: Amdocs Limited
description: Amdocs Limited is a leading provider of software and services to communications, cable, entertainment, and media service providers worldwide. The company specializes in customer experience, billing, and operational support systems, enabling its clients to undergo digital transformation, simplify business processes, and deliver personalized customer journeys. Amdocs offers a comprehensive portfolio of cloud-native solutions, managed services, and consulting to help service providers accelerate their transition to the cloud and monetize 5G networks.
